data.name: Oppai Daisuki
data.detailed_description:
Oppai Daisuki is a relaxing hentai puzzle game for true connoisseurs of anime curves. The game features:

  • 20 uncensored lewd puzzles with sexy anime girls

  • A smooth and intuitive interface

  • A chill, pleasant soundtrack to set the mood

  • Steam achievements

  • Gallery mode to view completed images

Perfect for unwinding and enjoying some quality 2D oppai. Adults only.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce GT 1030
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
